rationale: Six exact official MTA route rows establish source-local route identity, realized effective dates, and one stop-removal treatment apiece. Each route retains exactly one reviewed current GTFS anchor; current-routing language constrains treatment scope and does not create a routing treatment; every navigation and timetable cell is explicitly accounted for as non-treatment context.
